# omv_filesystems (Data Source)

Filesystems available to host shared folders (ShareMgmt.getCandidates).

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "omv_filesystems" "all" {}

output "filesystems" {
  value = data.omv_filesystems.all.filesystems
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `filesystems` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--filesystems))

<a id="nestedatt--filesystems"></a>
### Nested Schema for `filesystems`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String) Human-readable description, e.g. '/dev/md0 [data]'.
- `uuid` (String) Filesystem mntent UUID (use as shared folder mntentref).
